allow: Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./public/data/stats.json'\); console.log\('total:',s.total,'| final:',s.final,'| draft:',s.draft,'| review:',s.review,'| lastCall:',s.lastCall,'| stagnant:',s.stagnant,'| contributors:',s.contributors,'| lastUpdated:',s.lastUpdated\); console.log\('statusDist:', s.statusDistribution.map\(d=>d.name+'='+d.value\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('byBucket:', s.byBucket.map\(b=>b.bucket+'='+b.count\).join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(tsx -e "import\('./scripts/lib/write-data'\).then\(async m => { const {readFileSync,readdirSync}=await import\('fs'\); const {join}=await import\('path'\); const dir=join\(process.cwd\(\),'.data','EIPs','EIPS'\); const {parseEipMarkdown}=await import\('./src/lib/eip-parser'\); const {SEED_EIPS}=await import\('./src/lib/data/seed-eips'\); const map=new Map\(\); for\(const f of readdirSync\(dir\)\){if\(!/^eip-\\d+\\.md$/i.test\(f\)\)continue;const id=parseInt\(f.replace\(/\\D/g,''\),10\);try{map.set\(id,parseEipMarkdown\(id,readFileSync\(join\(dir,f\),'utf8'\)\)\)}catch{}} const ercDir=join\(process.cwd\(\),'.data','ERCs','ERCS'\); try{for\(const f of readdirSync\(ercDir\)\){if\(!/^erc-\\d+\\.md$/i.test\(f\)\)continue;const id=parseInt\(f.replace\(/\\D/g,''\),10\);try{map.set\(id,parseEipMarkdown\(id,readFileSync\(join\(ercDir,f\),'utf8'\)\)\)}catch{}}}catch{} for\(const s of SEED_EIPS\){const fe=map.get\(s.id\);if\(fe\)map.set\(s.id,{...fe,tags:fe.tags.length?fe.tags:s.tags,views:s.views,favorites:s.favorites,popularity:s.popularity}\)} await m.writeDataFiles\([...map.values\(\)]\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./public/data/stats.json'\); console.log\('total:',s.total\); console.log\('statusDist sum:', s.statusDistribution.reduce\(\(a,d\)=>a+d.value,0\)\); console.log\('dist:', s.statusDistribution.map\(d=>d.name+'='+d.value\).join\(', '\)\);")
